projectName: Jellycat Bashful bunnies yellow and navy
description: Jellycat Bashful bunnies yellow and navy — sewing and cleaning.
itemDetails:
Jellycat Bashful bunnies in yellow and navy are from Jellycat London's flagship Bashful rabbit range, a highly recognizable modern plush line since the late 1990s. Colorway variation is a major part of Jellycat collecting, especially when shades retire.

These bunnies are typically polyester plush with soft fill and minimal embroidered features for a clean nursery look. Collector demand is healthy, and matching color pairs with tags can command stronger resale than single, heavily used examples.
